title: Bollywood Dance Class
description: Energetic Bollywood-style dance class for seniors. Learn fun choreography set to popular Indian film music. Great for cardiovascular health, coordination and cultural appreciation.

title: Golden Age Yoga
description: Yoga class designed specifically for seniors. Gentle poses, breathing exercises and meditation to improve flexibility, balance and mental calmness. Suitable for all levels.

title: Ropeflow — Rhythmic Rope Exercise
description: Innovative rope flow exercise combining rhythmic rope movements with music. Improves shoulder mobility, coordination and cognitive function. A fun, low-impact workout for seniors.

title: Music & Movement — Wellness Dance
description: Expressive movement session combining music appreciation with gentle dance. Seniors explore rhythm, movement and creative expression in a supportive group setting.

title: NUS Nurse-Led E-Health Programme
description: Health monitoring programme in partnership with NUS Nursing. Trained nursing students conduct regular health assessments, chronic disease education and wellness coaching for community seniors.

title: Latin Dance for Seniors
description: Latin social dance class for seniors featuring cha-cha, rumba and salsa basics. Improves balance, rhythm and social confidence in a fun, supportive atmosphere.

title: Mindful Photography Workshop
description: Monthly photography workshop combining mindfulness with smartphone photography. Seniors learn to observe their surroundings mindfully and capture meaningful moments. Includes a photo walk around the neighbourhood.

title: Wellness Walk — Simei Park
description: Guided group walking programme at nearby parks. Combines brisk walking with mindful breathing exercises and stretching. Promotes cardiovascular health and community bonding.

title: GLOW — Gains in Living for Our Wellbeing
description: Tzu Chi's signature GLOW (Gains in Living for Our Wellbeing) programme combining gentle exercise, health education, mindfulness meditation and social activities. Based on Buddhist compassion principles, this holistic programme promotes physical, mental and spiritual wellness for seniors aged 60+.

title: SEEN — Seniors Engaged and ENriched
description: Tzu Chi's SEEN (Seniors Engaged and ENriched) programme providing structured social engagement activities including arts and crafts, cognitive games, cooking workshops and community volunteering. Designed to combat social isolation and provide purposeful engagement for elderly.

title: TCM Health Consultation
description: Free Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) consultation and treatment for seniors by volunteer TCM physicians. Services include acupuncture, cupping and herbal medicine advice. Part of Tzu Chi's volunteer medical mission.

title: Community Health Talk — Chronic Disease Management
description: Monthly health education talk by Tzu Chi's volunteer doctors (人医会 TIMA) covering chronic disease management, nutrition, preventive healthcare and mental wellness for seniors.

title: Qingming Festival Remembrance Ceremony
description: Buddhist Qingming Festival ceremony for seniors and families. Includes mindful remembrance rituals, vegetarian communal meal and dharma sharing. A meaningful cultural event promoting filial piety and gratitude.

title: Buddhist Mindfulness Meditation
description: Guided Buddhist mindfulness meditation session for seniors. Includes sitting meditation, walking meditation and dharma sharing. Promotes inner peace, stress reduction and spiritual growth.

title: Environmental Sustainability Day — Recycling Workshop
description: Monthly environmental sustainability activity where seniors sort recyclables, learn about eco-friendly living and create upcycled crafts. Part of Tzu Chi's environmental mission promoting a greener lifestyle.

title: Silver Lifestyle Club — Morning Devotion & Exercise
description: All Saints Home's Silver Lifestyle Club combining morning Christian devotional sharing with gentle group exercise. Includes hymn singing, short reflections and guided stretching for seniors.

title: Silver Lifestyle Club — Arts & Crafts Workshop
description: Creative arts and crafts workshop where seniors make handcrafted items such as greeting cards, festive decorations and simple handicrafts. Part of the Silver Lifestyle Club programme promoting fine motor skills and creativity.

title: Silver Lifestyle Club — Community Outing
description: Monthly community outing for Silver Lifestyle Club members to parks, gardens, museums and cultural sites. Transport and lunch provided. Encourages active mobility and social engagement.

title: Easter Celebration & Devotional
description: Special Easter celebration with devotional sharing, hymn singing, egg painting activity and festive refreshments. Open to all seniors — a meaningful gathering to celebrate the Easter season.

title: Silver Lifestyle Club — Karaoke & Sing-Along
description: Weekly karaoke and group singing session for Silver Lifestyle Club members. Sing hymns, oldies and popular favourites in a joyful, uplifting atmosphere.

title: Mahjong Social — Morning Session
description: Daily mahjong sessions for seniors in the Kim Tian neighbourhood. A popular cognitive and social activity where seniors gather for friendly games, tea and companionship.

title: Karaoke Session
description: Weekly karaoke singing sessions where seniors enjoy singing Malay, Mandarin, Hokkien and English favourites. A lively social activity bringing the Kim Tian community together through music.

title: Morning Exercise — Yoga & Stretching
description: Group yoga and stretching sessions for seniors led by volunteer instructors. Gentle poses and breathing exercises to improve flexibility, balance and overall wellness.

title: Community Excursion — Parks & Gardens
description: Monthly group excursion for seniors to parks, gardens and attractions around Singapore. Past visits include Gardens by the Bay, Botanic Gardens and Pulau Ubin. Transport and lunch provided.

title: Hari Raya Aidilfitri Celebration
description: Festive Hari Raya Aidilfitri celebration with traditional Malay food, ketupat weaving workshop, cultural performances and group singing. Open to all seniors and families in the Kim Tian community.

title: Arts & Craft Workshop
description: Weekly arts and crafts session where seniors explore creative activities including painting, paper crafts and seasonal decorations. Materials provided. All skill levels welcome.

title: WOW Workout — Geriatric Physiotherapy Fitness
description: FaithActs' signature WOW (We are of Worth) Workout programme. Quality fitness sessions conducted by geriatric physiotherapists and trained volunteers. Includes strength training, balance exercises and fall prevention tailored for seniors.

title: Social Recreational Programme — Games & Singing
description: Social recreation programme featuring games, festive celebrations, dancing, singing and craft activities. Engages seniors physically, mentally and socially in a warm, faith-based community setting.

title: Grey Matters — Cognitive Stimulation
description: FaithActs' Grey Matters cognitive stimulation programme. Brain-training games, memory exercises and puzzles designed to keep seniors mentally sharp and reduce cognitive decline risk.

title: Digital Clinic — Smartphone Skills
description: FaithActs' Digital Clinic where seniors receive one-to-one guidance on using smartphones, messaging apps, video calls and government e-services. Volunteer digital ambassadors provide personalised help.

title: Circuit Low Mobility Exercise
description: Specialised low-impact circuit exercise class for seniors with reduced mobility. Seated and standing exercises using resistance bands and light weights. Led by trained physiotherapy volunteers.

title: WOW Workout — Strength & Balance
description: FaithActs' signature WOW Workout programme at Margaret Drive centre. Geriatric physiotherapist-led strength and balance exercises with personalised attention for seniors of all fitness levels.

title: Music & Friends — Singing and Karaoke
description: Weekly Music and Friends session where seniors take turns singing classics and oldies. Volunteer singing coach Mdm Yip guides the group. An afternoon filled with laughter and music in a cosy atmosphere.

title: Intergenerational Activity with School Students
description: Monthly intergenerational programme where students from nearby schools visit to perform music, share songs and engage in activities with seniors. Builds cross-generational bonds and brings joy to the community.

title: Group Exercise — Active Seniors Workout
description: ECON Healthcare's structured group exercise programme combining strength training, balance exercises and gentle cardio. Led by trained fitness coaches with modifications for different ability levels.

title: Health Monitoring & Vital Signs Check
description: Daily health monitoring service by ECON Healthcare nurses. Blood pressure, blood glucose and weight tracking for community seniors. Results recorded in health passports for continuity of care.

title: Rehabilitation Exercises — Post-Stroke & Joint Care
description: Specialised rehabilitation exercises for seniors recovering from stroke, joint replacement or other conditions. Guided by trained therapists focusing on regaining mobility and functional independence.

title: Karaoke & Social Recreation
description: Weekly karaoke and social recreation session for seniors. Enjoy singing, board games and light refreshments in a healthcare-supported environment.

title: Morning Praise & Worship Exercise
description: Morning exercise session incorporating praise worship music and gentle movements. Combines Christian devotional songs with stretching and strength exercises in a joyful atmosphere.

title: Intergenerational Storytime with Children
description: Weekly intergenerational programme where seniors read stories and share life experiences with children from nearby preschools. Builds meaningful bonds between young and old in the community.

title: Bible Study & Fellowship
description: Weekly Bible study and Christian fellowship gathering for seniors. Includes scripture reading, group discussion, prayer and light refreshments. Open to all seniors seeking spiritual nourishment.

title: Arts & Craft — Creative Hands
description: Weekly creative arts and craft programme for seniors. Activities include painting, beadwork, paper crafts and seasonal decorations in a supportive Christian community setting.

title: Chinese Calligraphy Class
description: Weekly Chinese brush calligraphy class where seniors practice traditional characters and brush techniques. Promotes fine motor skills, concentration and cultural heritage appreciation.

title: Chinese Opera Appreciation — Cantonese Opera
description: Weekly Cantonese opera appreciation session where seniors watch classic opera performances, learn about opera traditions and practice basic singing techniques. A cherished cultural activity preserving Chinese performing arts heritage.

title: Chinese Painting — Brush & Ink Art
description: Traditional Chinese ink painting class teaching seniors brush painting techniques for landscapes, flowers and birds. Combines artistic expression with cultural appreciation and meditative focus.

title: Qigong & Morning Exercise
description: Daily morning Qigong and gentle exercise session rooted in Chinese wellness traditions. Slow, flowing movements combined with breathing techniques to promote health and vitality.

title: Festive Celebration — Dragon Boat Festival
description: Dragon Boat Festival celebration with rice dumpling (zhongzi) making workshop, cultural storytelling and festive communal lunch. A treasured Chinese cultural tradition bringing generations together.

title: Rehabilitation-Integrated Exercise Programme
description: Orange Valley's signature rehab-integrated exercise programme combining therapeutic exercises with group fitness. Led by allied health professionals focusing on functional rehabilitation and fall prevention.

title: Cognitive Rehabilitation Games
description: Structured cognitive rehabilitation programme using therapeutic games, memory exercises and puzzles. Designed by occupational therapists to maintain and improve cognitive function in seniors.

title: Health Monitoring & Wellness Checks
description: Daily nursing-led health monitoring including blood pressure, blood glucose and BMI tracking. Orange Valley's healthcare-trained staff provide continuity of care for community seniors.

title: Music Therapy & Sing-Along
description: Weekly music therapy and sing-along session designed by Orange Valley's therapy team. Uses music as a therapeutic tool to improve mood, memory recall and social engagement for seniors.

title: Yoga & Pranayama for Seniors
description: Traditional yoga and pranayama (breathing exercises) class rooted in Hindu wellness traditions. Gentle asanas, meditation and breathing techniques for physical and spiritual well-being.

title: Cultural Programme — Bhajan & Devotional Singing
description: Weekly bhajan (devotional song) singing session in multiple Indian languages including Tamil, Hindi, Malayalam and Sanskrit. A spiritual and cultural activity that brings Hindu seniors together.

title: Rangoli Art & Indian Craft Workshop
description: Weekly Indian arts and crafts session featuring rangoli art, kolam designs, flower garland making and traditional Indian crafts. Preserves cultural heritage while stimulating creativity.

title: Pongal Festival Celebration
description: Tamil New Year and Pongal harvest festival celebration with traditional rice cooking, kolam drawing, cultural performances and vegetarian feast. A joyous cultural event for Indian seniors and the community.

title: Ayurvedic Health Talk
description: Monthly health talk combining Ayurvedic wellness principles with modern healthcare advice. Topics include herbal remedies, dietary guidelines, seasonal wellness and stress management.

title: Morning Tai Chi & Qigong
description: Daily morning Tai Chi and Qigong session at the heart of Chinatown. Traditional Chinese martial arts exercises promoting balance, strength and mental focus for community seniors.

title: Mahjong & Chinese Chess Social
description: Daily mahjong and Chinese chess (xiangqi) sessions in the vibrant Chinatown setting. A cornerstone social activity for elderly residents in the Kreta Ayer neighbourhood.

title: Cantonese Opera Singing Group
description: Weekly Cantonese opera singing group where seniors practise traditional opera arias and folk songs. Preserves Chinatown's rich Cantonese performing arts heritage in a warm community setting.

title: Qingming Festival Remembrance Activity
description: Qingming Festival cultural activity with traditional practices, paper flower making and stories of Chinese ancestral remembrance traditions. A meaningful cultural event for Chinatown seniors.

title: Chinatown Heritage Walking Tour
description: Monthly guided heritage walk through Chinatown streets led by volunteer historians. Seniors explore historic shophouses, temples and traditional trades while staying physically active.

title: Morning Exercise — Active Seniors
description: Weekly group exercise programme for Jurong East seniors. Includes chair exercises, stretching and low-impact aerobics led by trained fitness volunteers.

title: Karaoke Social Afternoon
description: Weekly karaoke and singing sessions for Jurong East seniors. Enjoy favourite oldies in Mandarin, Hokkien and English. A popular social activity building community bonds through music.

title: Community Befriending Programme
description: Weekly befriending programme connecting trained volunteers with socially isolated seniors in Jurong East through home visits, phone calls and centre-based companionship activities.

title: Arts & Craft — Creative Workshop
description: Weekly arts and craft workshop for Jurong East seniors. Creative activities including painting, paper crafts, beadwork and seasonal decorations. Materials provided.

title: Morning Exercise — Tai Chi & Stretching
description: Daily morning Tai Chi and stretching session for Henderson neighbourhood seniors. Guided by trained volunteers to improve balance, flexibility and overall wellness.

title: Karaoke & Board Games Social
description: Weekly karaoke singing and board games afternoon for Henderson seniors. Enjoy music, Rummy-O, chess and card games in a friendly community atmosphere.

title: Befriending & Home Visit Programme
description: Weekly befriending programme pairing trained volunteers with isolated seniors in the Henderson estate for companionship visits and emotional support.

title: Morning Exercise Programme
description: Group exercise session for seniors in the Kampong Kapor area. Includes Tai Chi, chair exercises and light stretching to maintain physical fitness and prevent falls.

title: Arts & Craft Workshop
description: Weekly arts and crafts session for seniors in a multicultural community setting. Creative activities including painting, paper crafts and handicrafts. Materials provided.

title: Karaoke & Social Gathering
description: Weekly karaoke and social afternoon for Kampong Kapor seniors. Singing in multiple languages including Tamil, Malay, Mandarin and English, reflecting the area's multicultural heritage.

title: Morning Exercise — Active Ageing Fitness
description: Group fitness session for Jurong East seniors including stretching, strength training and low-impact cardio. Part of SAGE's holistic approach combining physical fitness with counselling support.

title: Counselling & Emotional Wellness Support
description: SAGE's signature elderly counselling service offering individual and group sessions. Trained counsellors help seniors manage loneliness, grief, family conflicts and mental health concerns.

title: Cognitive Stimulation — Brain Health Games
description: Weekly brain health games session featuring memory exercises, word games, puzzles and trivia. Part of SAGE's programme to maintain cognitive function and delay onset of dementia.

title: Karaoke & Social Recreation
description: Weekly karaoke and social recreation session for Jurong East seniors. A fun, therapeutic social activity providing mental stimulation and emotional uplift through music.

title: Morning Exercise — Zumba Gold
description: Zumba Gold fitness class adapted for seniors in the Jalan Besar neighbourhood. Easy-to-follow dance moves set to lively music for a fun cardiovascular workout.

title: Heritage & Cultural Programme — Kampung Spirit
description: Cultural engagement programme celebrating the rich Jalan Besar heritage. Seniors share kampung stories, explore local history and participate in traditional craft activities reflecting the area's multicultural past.

title: Karaoke Social Session
description: Weekly karaoke and social gathering for Jalan Besar seniors. Singing in Mandarin, Hokkien, Teochew and English with neighbours and friends.

title: Morning Exercise — Chair Yoga
description: Gentle chair yoga sessions adapted for seniors in the historic Kampung Glam area. Seated poses, breathing exercises and relaxation techniques for overall well-being.

title: Malay Cultural Heritage Programme
description: Cultural programme celebrating Kampung Glam's rich Malay heritage. Activities include traditional craft making, Malay kueh workshops and heritage storytelling sessions.

title: Cognitive Games & Social Recreation
description: Weekly cognitive games and social recreation session. Includes chess, carrom, card games and board games. A popular drop-in activity for seniors in the Kampung Glam neighbourhood.

title: ComSA Café Kawan — Community Social Dining
description: Tsao Foundation's signature Café Kawan (Friendship Café) — a daily communal dining space where Whampoa seniors gather over affordable meals and drinks. A social connector combating loneliness through shared meals and conversations.

title: Community Health Screening — Hua Mei
description: Comprehensive primary health screening by Tsao Foundation's Hua Mei Centre for Successful Ageing (HMCSA). Includes blood pressure, blood glucose, cholesterol checks, depression screening and medication reviews for adults aged 40+.

title: TCM Clinic — Traditional Chinese Medicine
description: Traditional Chinese Medicine clinic offering subsidised acupuncture, cupping and herbal medicine consultations for Whampoa seniors. Part of Hua Mei Centre's integrated care approach combining Western and Eastern medicine.

title: Learning Room — Self-Care Course for Seniors
description: Tsao Foundation's Learning Room self-care courses teaching seniors practical wellness skills. Topics include managing chronic pain, healthy cooking, fall prevention and digital literacy. Evidence-based curriculum.

title: Morning Exercise — Tai Chi at Whampoa Park
description: Community Tai Chi sessions at Whampoa Park organised by Tsao Foundation's ComSA programme. Open to all residents as part of the Community for Successful Ageing initiative.

title: Geriatric Counselling & Coaching
description: Professional geriatric counselling and coaching sessions by Tsao Foundation's trained counsellors. Supports seniors dealing with grief, loneliness, life transitions, caregiver stress and mental health concerns.

title: Morning Devotion & Exercise
description: Morning programme combining Christian devotional sharing, hymn singing and group exercise. CareElderly CCSS's faith-based approach to active ageing nurturing body and spirit together.

title: Arts & Craft — Handmade with Love
description: Creative arts and crafts programme where seniors make handcrafted items for community outreach. Products include greeting cards, knitted items and festive decorations, giving seniors a sense of purpose.

title: Community Befriending & Home Visitation
description: Weekly befriending programme where church volunteers visit isolated and homebound seniors in the community. Provides companionship, prayer support and connection to community resources.

title: Karaoke & Hymn Singing Fellowship
description: Weekly singing session combining karaoke favourites with Christian hymn singing. A joyful fellowship activity where seniors enjoy music, tea and companionship.

title: Gardening & Horticulture Therapy
description: Therapeutic gardening programme where seniors tend to herb and vegetable plots at the community garden. Promotes purposeful activity, gentle exercise and connection with nature.
venueAddress: Blk 122 Ang Mo Kio Ave 3 #01-1810, Singapore 560122

title: Cooking Class — Healthy Meals for Seniors
description: Weekly cooking class teaching seniors to prepare nutritious, easy-to-cook meals. Learn about healthy ingredients, portion sizes and dietary needs for active ageing. Communal lunch included.

title: Seniors' Birthday Celebration & Festive Party
description: Monthly birthday celebration and festive party for all AWWA Punggol seniors born in the month. Includes birthday cake, performances by volunteers, games and prizes.

title: Digital Literacy — Smartphone & E-services Workshop
description: Hands-on digital literacy workshop helping seniors navigate smartphones, government e-services (Singpass, HealthHub) and online safety. One-to-one guidance by trained digital ambassadors.
